executive_summary.headline: Current AQI is Satisfactory; Medium-Priority Preventive Actions Recommended

aqi_estimate.note: Approximate AQI estimate; not official CPCB breakpoint AQI yet.

stations.note: CPCB breakpoint AQI computed from available latest pollutant values. Missing pollutants are not fabricated. This is not a final regulatory AQI unless correct averaging windows are used.

forecast_validation.important_warning: This is a first real-data benchmark on one OpenAQ station using approximate AQI. It validates the training/evaluation pipeline, but citywide deployment requires more stations, official AQI calculation, and longer historical coverage.

evidence: fresh station snapshot includes traffic-relevant pollutants where available

does_not_prove: specific factory or road segment responsibility
caveats: Sentinel-5P NO2 is a column measurement, not direct ground-level AQI.
Satellite evidence supports regional combustion-pattern context, not causal source proof.
Clouds, retrieval quality, and satellite overpass timing can affect coverage.

reason: Wind is reported from the east sector.
Exact upwind road-segment geometry is not yet computed.
Wind is reported from the east sector.
Industrial POI count alone does not prove emissions impact.
Low wind can allow local pollutant accumulation.

does_not_prove: exact upwind source contribution without source-coordinate geometry
stations.recommended_next_upgrade: Add exact road-segment and industrial-POI bearings from the station, then compare source bearings against wind direction sectors.

wind_sector_evidence.warning: This tool provides screening-level wind-sector evidence. It does not prove source attribution.

groq_supervisor_decision.decision_headline: Current AQI is Satisfactory; Medium-Priority Preventive Actions Recommended
groq_supervisor_decision.reasoning_summary: The current estimated AQI is 76.275 (Satisfactory), and the selected forecast method is the 24-hour rolling mean baseline, which improves over persistence by 24.48%. The PM10/PM2.5 ratio and road density support road dust/resuspension as a plausible hypothesis. Wind-sector analysis increases confidence in road dust/resuspension and traffic corridor exposure hypotheses due to low wind speed and eastward wind direction.
key_evidence_used: Forecast method: rolling_mean_24h; RMSE improvement vs persistence: 24.48%
Sentinel-5P NO2 signal: moderate_relative_no2 from 269 images
Wind direction sector: east; wind speed class: low

recommended_actions.action: Targeted mechanical road sweeping and water misting
why: PM10-heavy signal and road density 26.0497 km/km²
Action is low-regret and operationally deployable.
Wind-sector analysis supports road dust/resuspension hypothesis

recommended_actions.action: Traffic flow and idling control near major road corridor
why: Major road density 4.568 km/km²
Major road lies close to the monitoring point.
Wind-sector analysis slightly increases confidence in traffic corridor exposure hypothesis

recommended_actions.action: Schedule dust and traffic interventions during poor-dispersion window
why: Dispersion risk is medium
Low wind can allow pollutants to accumulate locally.
Wind speed class is low

recommended_actions.action: Screen nearby industrial units for compliance risk
why: 15 industrial-tagged OSM features within radius
POI proximity is not causal proof, so action should begin with screening.
Wind-sector analysis slightly increases confidence in industrial influence hypothesis

recommended_actions.action: Prepare targeted advisory for nearby sensitive receptors
why: 6 school/hospital POIs within radius
Current estimated AQI category is Satisfactory

safe_claims: Road dust/resuspension is a plausible hypothesis.
Traffic corridor exposure is a plausible hypothesis.
Industrial influence is a low-to-medium confidence hypothesis requiring verification.
The system has validated real-data ingestion and forecasting benchmarks.
claims_to_avoid: Industrial influence is confirmed as a pollution source.
The learned ML model is currently the best operational forecast method.
The source attribution is causal proof.
limitations: The current AQI target is approximate and must later be replaced with official CPCB breakpoint AQI.
Satellite NO2 is a column measurement, not direct ground-level AQI.
Wind-sector analysis provides screening-level evidence, not causal source attribution.

citizen_advisory.english_advisory: The current air quality near Chennai station area is satisfactory. People with pre-existing conditions should stay aware and reduce exposure near dusty or high-traffic roads if they feel discomfort.
citizen_advisory.hindi_advisory: वर्तमान वायु गुणवत्ता संतोषजनक है। घबराने की जरूरत नहीं है। दमा, हृदय रोग, बच्चों, वृद्ध लोगों और आउटडोर वर्कर्स को धूल भरी या भारी यातायात वाली सड़कों के पास असुविधा महसूस होने पर जागरूक रहना चाहिए और एक्सपोजर कम करना चाहिए।
what_not_to_claim: Do not claim industrial influence is a confirmed pollution source.
Do not claim the learned ML model is the best operational forecast method.
data_limitations: Clouds and retrieval quality affecting satellite coverage
